causalAutopsy.notes: ELAPSED_RE's 'in' anchor listed a CLOSING paren in its boundary set but not an OPENING one. Latent since the anchor shipped; surfaced 2026-07-23 when two fabricated elapsed-time claims went out unflagged during a live time-boxed autonomous run. Diagnosed against the real /messaging/preflight endpoint: identical text with a trailing period returns a correct TIME_CLAIM advisory, with ' (' returns advisories:[]. The parenthetical form extracted ZERO claims, so the clock comparison never executed — a miss at the extraction stage, not the comparison stage.
